name: Lung Cancer Screening CT (Low Dose)
description: Low-dose CT for lung cancer screening in high-risk patients per NLST criteria

findings.technique: Low-dose non-contrast CT of the chest was performed for lung cancer screening according to NLST protocol.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Lungs
sections.content: The lungs demonstrate [no nodules / no solid nodules / no subsolid nodules]. The parenchyma is [clear / no ground-glass opacities / no interstitial changes].

sections.name: Nodules
sections.content: There are [no pulmonary nodules / no suspicious nodules] identified. No nodule requiring follow-up.

sections.name: Airway
sections.content: The trachea and main bronchi are [patent / no obstruction / no stenosis]. No endobronchial lesion.

sections.name: Mediastinum
sections.content: The mediastinum demonstrates [no lymphadenopathy / no masses / no abnormalities]. The hila are [unremarkable].

sections.name: Pleura
sections.content: The bilateral pleura demonstrate [no thickening / no effusion / no plaques]. No pleural abnormalities.

sections.name: Cardiac Silhouette
sections.content: The cardiac silhouette is [normal / no cardiomegaly]. No acute cardiopulmonary process.

sections.name: Upper Abdomen
sections.content: The upper abdomen is [unremarkable / no concerning findings] visualized on the inferior cuts.

impression: Lung-RADS Category 1: Negative. No lung nodules identified. Low probability of malignancy.
author: RadReport Templates
